title: PonyCraft a New Generation Vanilla
description: A lightweight Clientside modpack with Ponies for Ponies
body:
A vanilla like modpack inspired by XarraxXP's [X-PonyCraft Vanilla](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/x-ponycraft-vanilla) and with optimization mods inspired by [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)


It's supposed to reflect the original intentions of X-PonyCraft Vanilla to add MineLP with a few quality of live mods
the differences are:
- modern versions of minecraft
- I added EMI (REI if EMI is unavailable for that version) instead of Not Enough Items
- Xaero's Map instead of VoxelMap
- added optimization mods from [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)
- added Iris 
- include multiple Brony servers
![List of servers included](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/OltYp4he/images/976d98b2f893e670ea8a53f9a8912465a5e4cb6f.png)
